title: Chore: Add automated backup system
original_text: Added automated backup system for database and files. Implemented daily incremental backups. Implemented weekly full backups. Added backup retention policy (keep 30 daily, 12 weekly). Implemented backup encryption. Added backup integrity verification. Implemented backup restoration testing. Added backup monitoring and alerting. Result: backups running successfully.
expected_body_lines: - Implement backup encryption and integrity verification
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(ops): add automated backup system"
